Variables.Name: CurrentSkeleton
Variables.Description: This is used to extract animation. If Mesh exists, this will be overwritten by Mesh->Skeleton

Variables.Name: bRunUpdatesInWorkerThreads_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
DEPRECATED: No longer used.
	  Allows this anim instance to update its native update, blend tree, montages and asset players on
	  a worker thread. this requires certain conditions to be met:
	  - All access of variables in the blend tree should be a direct access of a member variable
	  - No BlueprintUpdateAnimation event should be used (i.e. the event graph should be empty). Only native update is permitted.

Variables.Name: bCanUseParallelUpdateAnimation_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
DEPRECATED: No longer used.
	  Whether we can use parallel updates for our animations.
	  Conditions affecting this include:
	  - Use of BlueprintUpdateAnimation
	  - Use of non 'fast-path' EvaluateGraphExposedInputs in the node graph

Variables.Name: bUseMultiThreadedAnimationUpdate
Variables.Description:
Allows this anim instance to update its native update, blend tree, montages and asset players on
	  a worker thread. This flag is propagated from the UAnimBlueprint to this instance by the compiler.
	  The compiler will attempt to pick up any issues that may occur with threaded update.
	  For updates to run in multiple threads both this flag and the project setting "Allow Multi Threaded
	  Animation Update" should be set.

Variables.Name: bWarnAboutBlueprintUsage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
Selecting this option will cause the compiler to emit warnings whenever a call into Blueprint
	  is made from the animation graph. This can help track down optimizations that need to be made.

Variables.Name: bQueueMontageEvents
Variables.Description:
True when Montages are being ticked, and Montage Events should be queued.
	  When Montage are being ticked, we queue AnimNotifies and Events. We trigger notifies first, then Montage events.

Variables.Name: ActiveAnimNotifyState
Variables.Description:
Currently Active AnimNotifyState, stored as a copy of the event as we need to
		is removed correctly.

Variables.Name: bNeedUpdateNotAttributeCurve
Variables.Description: 此动画蓝图是否需要更新非Attribute的Curve数据

Variables.Name: FollowedAnimInstance
Variables.Description: 记录被跟随者的动画实例   当该指针为nullptr时，代表启用了自身 Proxy 的 Follow 轨道(即FollowGroupArrays开始记录)

Variables.Name: PostCompileValidationClassName
Variables.Description:
Name of Class to do Post Compile Validation.
	 See Class UAnimBlueprintPostCompileValidation.

Functions.Name: SavePoseSnapshot
Functions.Description:
Takes a snapshot of the current skeletal mesh component pose & saves it internally.
	  This snapshot can then be retrieved by name in the animation blueprint for blending.
	  The snapshot is taken at the current LOD, so if for example you took the snapshot at LOD1 and then used it at LOD0 any bones not in LOD1 will use the reference pose

Functions.Name: SnapshotPose
Functions.Description:
Takes a snapshot of the current skeletal mesh component pose and saves it to the specified snapshot.
	  The snapshot is taken at the current LOD, so if for example you took the snapshot at LOD1
	  and then used it at LOD0 any bones not in LOD1 will use the reference pose

Functions.Name: GetOwningActor
Functions.Description: Returns the owning actor of this AnimInstance

Functions.Name: BlueprintShouldSkipUpdateAnimation
Functions.Description: Executed before the Animation is updated, Check custom condition, whether to skip update

Functions.Name: BlueprintInitializeAnimation
Functions.Description: Executed when the Animation is initialized

Functions.Name: BlueprintUpdateAnimation
Functions.Description: Executed when the Animation is updated

Functions.Name: BlueprintPostEvaluateAnimation
Functions.Description: Executed after the Animation is evaluated

Functions.Name: BlueprintBeginPlay
Functions.Description: Executed when begin play is called on the owning component

Functions.Name: PlaySlotAnimation
Functions.Description:
SlotAnimation
	 
	 DEPRECATED. Use PlaySlotAnimationAsDynamicMontage instead, it returns the UAnimMontage created instead of time, allowing more control 
	 Play normal animation asset on the slot node. You can only play one asset (whether montage or animsequence) at a time.

Functions.Name: PlaySlotAnimationAsDynamicMontage
Functions.Description: Play normal animation asset on the slot node by creating a dynamic UAnimMontage. You can only play one asset (whether montage or animsequence) at a time per SlotGroup.

Functions.Name: StopSlotAnimation
Functions.Description: Stops currently playing slot animation slot or all

Functions.Name: IsPlayingSlotAnimation
Functions.Description: Return true if it's playing the slot animation

Functions.Name: SetMontageCustomSectionsPlayInfo
Functions.Description: AnimMontage

Functions.Name: Montage_Play
Functions.Description: Plays an animation montage. Returns the length of the animation montage in seconds. Returns 0.f if failed to play.

Functions.Name: Montage_Stop
Functions.Description: Stops the animation montage. If reference is NULL, it will stop ALL active montages.

Functions.Name: Montage_Pause
Functions.Description: Pauses the animation montage. If reference is NULL, it will pause ALL active montages.

Functions.Name: Montage_Resume
Functions.Description: Resumes a paused animation montage. If reference is NULL, it will resume ALL active montages.

Functions.Name: Montage_JumpToSection
Functions.Description: Makes a montage jump to a named section. If Montage reference is NULL, it will do that to all active montages.

Functions.Name: Montage_JumpToSectionsEnd
Functions.Description: Makes a montage jump to the end of a named section. If Montage reference is NULL, it will do that to all active montages.

Functions.Name: Montage_SetNextSection
Functions.Description:
Relink new next section AFTER SectionNameToChange in run-time
	 	You can link section order the way you like in editor, but in run-time if you'd like to change it dynamically,
	 	use this function to relink the next section
	 	For example, you can have Start->Loop->Loop->Loop.... but when you want it to end, you can relink
	 	next section of Loop to be End to finish the montage, in which case, it stops looping by Loop->End.

Params.Name: SectionNameToChange
Params.Description: : This should be the name of the Montage Section after which you want to insert a new next section

Functions.Name: Montage_SetPlayRate
Functions.Description: Change AnimMontage play rate. NewPlayRate = 1.0 is the default playback rate.

Functions.Name: Montage_IsActive
Functions.Description: Returns true if the animation montage is active. If the Montage reference is NULL, it will return true if any Montage is active.

Functions.Name: Montage_IsPlaying
Functions.Description:
Returns true if the animation montage is currently active and playing.
	If reference is NULL, it will return true is ANY montage is currently active and playing.

Functions.Name: MontageGroup_IsPlaying
Functions.Description: 判断有无某个组下的蒙太奇正在播放

Functions.Name: Montage_GetCurrentSection
Functions.Description: Returns the name of the current animation montage section.

Functions.Name: Montage_GetPosition
Functions.Description: Get Current Montage Position

Functions.Name: Montage_SetPosition
Functions.Description: Set position.

Functions.Name: Montage_GetIsStopped
Functions.Description: return true if Montage is not currently active. (not valid or blending out)

Functions.Name: Montage_GetBlendTime
Functions.Description:
Get the current blend time of the Montage.
	If Montage reference is NULL, it will return the current blend time on the first active Montage found.

Functions.Name: Montage_GetPlayRate
Functions.Description:
Get PlayRate for Montage.
	If Montage is not playing, 0 is returned.

Functions.Name: IsAnyMontagePlaying
Functions.Description: Returns true if any montage is playing currently. Doesn't mean it's active though, it could be blending out.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentActiveMontage
Functions.Description:
Get a current Active Montage in this AnimInstance.
		Note that there might be multiple Active at the same time. This will only return the first active one it finds.

Functions.Name: GetCurMontageBySlot
Functions.Description: Get the UAnimMontage currently running that matches this SlotName.  Will return NULL if no instance is found.

Functions.Name: AddAnimAssetNoGCRef
Functions.Description: 添加动画资源到非GC引用列表，返回全局唯一ID

Functions.Name: RemoveAnimAssetNoGCRef
Functions.Description: 从非GC引用列表移除动画资源（通过ID）

Functions.Name: RemoveAllAnimAssetNoGCRef
Functions.Description: 从非GC引用列表移除所有动画资源（通过资源指针）

Functions.Name: ClearAnimAssetsNoGCReferences
Functions.Description: 清空非GC引用列表

Functions.Name: StopAllMontages
Functions.Description: Stop all montages that are active

Functions.Name: ClearAllMontages
Functions.Description: Stop all montages that are active

Functions.Name: SetRootMotionMode
Functions.Description: Set RootMotionMode

Functions.Name: GetInstanceAssetPlayerLength
Functions.Description:
NOTE: Derived anim getters
	 
	  Anim getter functions can be defined for any instance deriving UAnimInstance.
	  To do this the function must be marked BlueprintPure, and have the AnimGetter metadata entry set to
	  "true". Following the instructions below, getters should appear correctly in the blueprint node context
	  menu for the derived classes
	 
	  A context string can be provided in the GetterContext metadata and can contain any (or none) of the
	  following entries separated by a pipe (|)
	  Transition  - Only available in a transition rule
	  AnimGraph   - Only available in an animgraph (also covers state anim graphs)
	  CustomBlend - Only available in a custom blend graph
	 
	  Anim getters support a number of automatic parameters that will be baked at compile time to be passed
	  to the functions. They will not appear as pins on the graph node. They are as follows:
	  AssetPlayerIndex - Index of an asset player node to operate on, one getter will be added to the blueprint action list per asset node available
	  MachineIndex     - Index of a state machine in the animation blueprint, one getter will be added to the blueprint action list per state machine
	  StateIndex       - Index of a state inside a state machine, also requires MachineIndex. One getter will be added to the blueprint action list per state
	  TransitionIndex  - Index of a transition inside a state machine, also requires MachineIndex. One getter will be added to the blueprint action list per transition
	 
	  Gets the length in seconds of the asset referenced in an asset player node

Functions.Name: GetInstanceAssetPlayerTime
Functions.Description: Get the current accumulated time in seconds for an asset player node

Functions.Name: GetInstanceAssetPlayerTime_BP
Functions.Description: Get the current accumulated time in seconds for an asset player node

Functions.Name: GetInstanceAssetPlayerTimeFraction
Functions.Description: Get the current accumulated time as a fraction for an asset player node

Functions.Name: GetInstanceAssetPlayerTimeFromEnd
Functions.Description: Get the time in seconds from the end of an animation in an asset player node

Functions.Name: GetInstanceAssetPlayerTimeFromEndFraction
Functions.Description: Get the time as a fraction of the asset length of an animation in an asset player node

Functions.Name: GetInstanceMachineWeight
Functions.Description: Get the blend weight of a specified state machine

Functions.Name: GetInstanceStateWeight
Functions.Description: Get the blend weight of a specified state

Functions.Name: GetInstanceCurrentStateElapsedTime
Functions.Description: Get the current elapsed time of a state within the specified state machine

Functions.Name: GetInstanceTransitionCrossfadeDuration
Functions.Description: Get the crossfade duration of a specified transition

Functions.Name: GetInstanceTransitionTimeElapsed
Functions.Description: Get the elapsed time in seconds of a specified transition

Functions.Name: GetInstanceTransitionTimeElapsedFraction
Functions.Description: Get the elapsed time as a fraction of the crossfade duration of a specified transition

Functions.Name: GetRelevantAnimTimeRemaining
Functions.Description: Get the time remaining in seconds for the most relevant animation in the source state

Functions.Name: GetRelevantAnimTimeRemainingFraction
Functions.Description: Get the time remaining as a fraction of the duration for the most relevant animation in the source state

Functions.Name: GetRelevantAnimLength
Functions.Description: Get the length in seconds of the most relevant animation in the source state

Functions.Name: GetRelevantAnimTime
Functions.Description: Get the current accumulated time in seconds for the most relevant animation in the source state

Functions.Name: GetRelevantAnimTimeFraction
Functions.Description: Get the current accumulated time as a fraction of the length of the most relevant animation in the source state

Functions.Name: GetCurveValue
Functions.Description: Returns the value of a named curve.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentStateName
Functions.Description: Returns the name of a currently active state in a state machine.

Functions.Name: SetMorphTarget
Functions.Description: Sets a morph target to a certain weight.

Functions.Name: ClearMorphTargets
Functions.Description: Clears the current morph targets.

Functions.Name: CalculateDirection
Functions.Description:
Returns degree of the angle betwee velocity and Rotation forward vector
	  The range of return will be from [-180, 180], and this can be used to feed blendspace directional value

Functions.Name: LockAIResources
Functions.Description:
locks indicated AI resources of animated pawn
	 	DEPRECATED. Use LockAIResourcesWithAnimation instead

Functions.Name: UnlockAIResources
Functions.Description:
unlocks indicated AI resources of animated pawn. Will unlock only animation-locked resources.
	 	DEPRECATED. Use UnlockAIResourcesWithAnimation instead

Functions.Description: Trigger AnimNotifies

Delegate.Description: Called when a montage starts blending out, whether interrupted or finished
